text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's wrong, C.B.? You look bored outta
your mind. Didja get held up by a teacher or
something?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that I did. She was all mad that I jumped
down here from the window.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The breeze felt so nice passing by, I couldn't help
but want to spread my wings a little. I didn't think
anyone'd notice.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Oh, jumping out the window, that makes
sense—not! What were you thinking?! You
could've gotten hurt! What's wrong with stairs?!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, if you wanna feel the wind in your hair,
I've got a better option. Look around. What do
you see?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Uh... Nothing out of the ordinary. Just you.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Just you and me! C'mon, let's get to the
track. I'll get that tired look off your face in no
time!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What a bold invitation. Haha, sounds good
to me, though.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's parkour over the roof real quick.
No sense going the long way when the sky's so
lovely.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're on! ...Wait, no! We are NOT hopping the roof!
